messages.content:
In Latin
"God creating himself"
In Latin, "God creating himself" can be translated as "Deus se ipsum creans."

In Odia
SEVERE STORM WARNING IN YOUR AREA
In Odia, "SEVERE STORM WARNING IN YOUR AREA" can be translated as "ଆପଣଙ୍କ ଏଲାକାରେ ଗୁରୁତର ଝଡ଼ର ସତର୍କତା ।"

In French
"Your family wants you to work safely."
In French, "Your family wants you to work safely." can be translated as "Ta famille veut que tu travailles en sécurité."

In French
"We hope you are happy wherever you are."
In French, "We hope you are happy wherever you are." can be translated as "Nous espérons que tu es heureux(se) où que tu sois."

In Russian
"Your family wants you to work safely."
In Russian, "Your family wants you to work safely." can be translated as "Твоя семья хочет, чтобы ты работал(а) безопасно."

In Russian
"The Consortium"
In Russian, "The Consortium" is translated as "Консорциум".
Write a Telegu proverb.

One Telugu proverb is:

"చేతబడి చేసినవాడు చచ్చినట్టే, చేతబడి నమ్మినవాడు చచ్చిపోతాడు."

Transliteration: "Chetabadi chesinavaadu chachhinatte, chetabadi namminavaadu chachhipotadu."

Translation: "The one who practices witchcraft is as good as dead, the one who believes in it indeed dies."

This proverb emphasizes the power of belief and suggestion over actual actions or practices.

In Polish
"Forgive my brother, for he is misguided."
In Polish, "Forgive my brother, for he is misguided." can be translated as "Wybacz mojemu bratu, bo jest w błędzie."

In Polish
"Ah yes, Bone People. I have no further questions."
In Polish, "Ah yes, Bone People. I have no further questions." can be translated as "Ach tak, Ludzie Kości. Nie mam więcej pytań."

In Polish
"Be quiet, they might hear you."
In Polish, "Be quiet, they might hear you." can be translated as "Bądź cicho, oni mogą cię usłyszeć."
